correctness.description: Technical accuracy based on standard assumptions.

relevance.description: How directly the answer addresses the question.

rules: Give 0.5 only when the main concept of the ideal answer is present.
Give 0.25 for partial understanding, vague explanation, or missing key parts.
Give 0.0 if the answer is incorrect or unrelated.
Evaluate based on meaning, not exact keywords.
At least one dimension should be positive if the answer is relevant.

signals.candidate_struggling: Emit true only if all dimensions are 0.
